title: This Workflow Auto-Posts to 9 Different Socials (free template)

extracted.hook: Today, I'm going to show you guys exactly how I built this system so that I can auto post content on nine different social channels.
transitions: So, I don't want to waste any time here.
In order to actually set all of this up for yourself

time_references: like every 5 minutes at like 6:00 a.m.

extracted.vulnerability: "I've used Botato before, but I used it before they dropped this verified community node. So, now it's a lot easier"

accelerates: discussing the auto-posting process and workflow setup
slows: explaining the old HTTP request method vs. native node method

frameworks: "The first thing we need to do before we can actually post is we need to create a Blot API key."

"And then from there, what happens is Botato basically says, 'Okay, I see your video and I turn it into my own video. I don't add like a watermark or anything. I'm literally just copying it over so I can access it and then I'm going to post it on Instagram and Tik Tok for you.'"
"And here's another example where we automated not only the posting, but the content creation."
